tweets.text:
1.  Three things to know about John Healey, Britain's new Chancellor (Finance Minister):
A surprise pick — as late as this morning, one of the "prediction markets" had his cabinet colleague Shabana Mahmood at 92%.
Treasury experience — he has had direct Treasury experience, having been a Junior Minister in the Blair government.
Advocate for Defence spending — he resigned from the Starmer government on the issue.
2. Three of the main questions looking forward:
How will he accommodate his desire for higher defence spending within a tight fiscal envelope that is also vulnerable to external shocks?
More generally, what type of flexibility will he seek operating within the fiscal rules?
How will he coordinate with the Prime Minister's office to ensure that a comprehensive growth policy approach is not repeatedly sidelined by excessive concentration on narrow budget arithmetic?
More to follow.
#economy #uk #markets @JohnHealey_MP #johnhealey #cabinet @hmtreasury
